releases.label: 2RXS
releases.summary: Second ROSAT all-sky survey source catalogue (Boller et al. 2016, A&A 588, A103) — ~135,000 X-ray detections at existence likelihood >= 6.5 (~71,000 at the conservative threshold of 9) in the 0.1-2.4 keV band, from PSPC all-sky survey observations of June 1990 - August 1991; final ROSAT point-source catalogue, deepest X-ray all-sky catalogue before eROSITA
